# services.workout-tracker

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.workout-tracker`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.workout-tracker.address` | `string` | Web interface address. |
| `services.workout-tracker.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable workout tracking web application for personal use (or family, friends), geared towards running and other GPX-based activities. |
| `services.workout-tracker.environmentFile` | `null or absolute path` | An environment file as defined in {manpage}`systemd.exec(5)`. Secrets like `WT_JWT_ENCRYPTION_KEY` may be passed to the service without adding them to the world-readable Nix store. |
| `services.workout-tracker.package` | `package` | The workout-tracker package to use. |
| `services.workout-tracker.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Web interface port. |
| `services.workout-tracker.settings` | `attribute set of string` | Extra config options. |
